news.title:
Bajaj Finance confirms interest and redemption payments for NCDs due by March 30-31, 2026, totaling ₹70.2 lakh.
Both interest and redemption payments were made on schedule, adhering to SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance confirms interest and redemption payments for NCDs due by March 30-31, 2026, totaling ₹70.2 lakh.
Both interest and redemption payments were made on schedule, adhering to SEBI regulations.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv plans an AI-only fund, as per Chairman Sanjiv Bajaj.
The company intends to make direct investments aligned with this initiative.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv plans an AI-only fund, as per Chairman Sanjiv Bajaj.
The company intends to make direct investments aligned with this initiative.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv plans ₹400-₹450 Cr AI investments via a private equity fund and direct startups funding by FY27.
Bajaj Alts will manage AI, real estate, and public market funds as part of its alternatives strategy; shares fell 2.45% to ₹1,653.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv plans ₹400-₹450 Cr AI investments via a private equity fund and direct startups funding by FY27.
Bajaj Alts will manage AI, real estate, and public market funds as part of its alternatives strategy; shares fell 2.45% to ₹1,653.

news.title:
Mcap of 7 top firms fell by ₹1.75 trn; Reliance lost ₹89,720.3 cr, HDFC Bank ₹37,248.6 cr.
L&T, Bajaj Finance, Infosys gained; geopolitical tensions drove market volatility, Sensex fell 1.3%.
news.summary:
Mcap of 7 top firms fell by ₹1.75 trn; Reliance lost ₹89,720.3 cr, HDFC Bank ₹37,248.6 cr.
L&T, Bajaj Finance, Infosys gained; geopolitical tensions drove market volatility, Sensex fell 1.3%.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv trades at Rs 1,746.2, showing signs of trend reversal.
Stock finds support near 200-week EMA, a strong technical base.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv trades at Rs 1,746.2, showing signs of trend reversal.
Stock finds support near 200-week EMA, a strong technical base.

news.title:
Foreign inflows, totaling $12-13B last year, bolster Indian banks/NBFCs, aiding small/mid-sized lenders like RBL Bank.
Cholamandalam and Bajaj Finance cited as examples for diversification to mitigate margin/growth pressures amid rising competition.
news.summary:
Foreign inflows, totaling $12-13B last year, bolster Indian banks/NBFCs, aiding small/mid-sized lenders like RBL Bank.
Cholamandalam and Bajaj Finance cited as examples for diversification to mitigate margin/growth pressures amid rising competition.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance's P/E stands at 29.0, higher than the industry's 19.6.
Its Nifty 50 inclusion, large-cap status, and investor sentiment influence its performance.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance's P/E stands at 29.0, higher than the industry's 19.6.
Its Nifty 50 inclusion, large-cap status, and investor sentiment influence its performance.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance saw a block trade of ~301,540 shares at Rs. 822.5.
The trade totaled Rs. 24.8 crores on the NSE.
news.summary:

news.title:
Bajaj Finance's board approved issuing 3,472,439 equity shares under the BFL Employee Stock Option Scheme.
The issue is per Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR. The board meeting concluded at 4:10 PM on March 23, 2026.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance's board approved issuing 3,472,439 equity shares under the BFL Employee Stock Option Scheme.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv hits 52-week low of Rs 1674.75 on 23 Mar 2026.
Stock fell 6.4% over three days but outperformed its sector on the day.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv hits 52-week low of Rs 1674.75 on 23 Mar 2026.

news.title:
Assiduus Global secures $25M in pre-Series B funding led by Bajaj Finserv.
Other investors include Uncorrelated Ventures, Aaruha Tech Fund, and Rupa Family Office.
news.summary:
Assiduus Global secures $25M in pre-Series B funding led by Bajaj Finserv.
Other investors include Uncorrelated Ventures, Aaruha Tech Fund, and Rupa Family Office.

news.title:
Bajaj Finance shares fell 5.2%, eroding ₹1trn in m-cap since Feb 27 amid West Asia crisis.
Analysts suggest long-term potential despite volatility; current P/B valuation closer to 5x.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finance shares fell 5.2%, eroding ₹1trn in m-cap since Feb 27 amid West Asia crisis.
Analysts suggest long-term potential despite volatility; current P/B valuation closer to 5x.

news.title:
Shriram Finance shares fell 7%, marking the sharpest drop since June 2024, leading Nifty 50 losses.
Macquarie suggests new regulatory norms for NBFCs may impact Shriram Finance and Bajaj Finance significantly.
news.summary:
Shriram Finance shares fell 7%, marking the sharpest drop since June 2024, leading Nifty 50 losses.
Macquarie suggests new regulatory norms for NBFCs may impact Shriram Finance and Bajaj Finance significantly.

news.title:
RBI clarifies no leadership curbs for NBFCs; Shriram Finance rises 2.4%, Bajaj Finance up 2.9% before reversing.
LIC Housing, Muthoot, Jio Financial gained 0.5%-2.5%; relief for NBFCs amid global market challenges and crude price spikes.
news.summary:
RBI clarifies no leadership curbs for NBFCs; Shriram Finance rises 2.4%, Bajaj Finance up 2.9% before reversing.
LIC Housing, Muthoot, Jio Financial gained 0.5%-2.5%; relief for NBFCs amid global market challenges and crude price spikes.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Infosys were top mutual fund buys in February, while SBI and Bajaj Finance saw selling.
Mutual funds remain overweight on pharma, e-commerce, and capital goods, while underweight on private banks, oil & gas, and IT services.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, and Infosys were top mutual fund buys in February, while SBI and Bajaj Finance saw selling.
Mutual funds remain overweight on pharma, e-commerce, and capital goods, while underweight on private banks, oil & gas, and IT services.

news.title:
Kotak revises its model portfolio, increasing Bajaj Finance exposure by 160 basis points to 480, targeting a 41% upside.
Eternal allocation rises by 60 basis points; Kotak sees 70% upside potential for the stock from current levels.
news.summary:
Kotak revises its model portfolio, increasing Bajaj Finance exposure by 160 basis points to 480, targeting a 41% upside.
Eternal allocation rises by 60 basis points; Kotak sees 70% upside potential for the stock from current levels.

news.title:

Redemption confirmed as per SEBI circular; details recorded by BSE.
news.summary:

news.title:

Axis Bank also witnessed a drop contributing to market downturn.
news.summary:

news.title:
RBI may plug regulatory gaps affecting NBFCs like Bajaj Finance and Shriram Finance.
Both stocks fell; Bajaj Finance down 4.5% to ₹897, Shriram Finance down 2.6% to ₹1,034.9.
news.summary:
RBI may plug regulatory gaps affecting NBFCs like Bajaj Finance and Shriram Finance.
